title: Caldera - Lateral Tool Transfer via scp/rsync (Linux)
description: Detects transfer of attacker tools or payloads to other hosts via scp, rsync, or curl. Caldera T1570 emulation copies implants from the initial foothold to lateral targets over SSH (scp) or HTTP (curl download-and-execute). Detection focuses on transfers from /tmp or /dev/shm to remote hosts.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*scp /tmp/*' or msg like '*scp /dev/shm/*' or msg like '*scp /var/tmp/*')) or ( ((msg like '*scp -i *' or msg like '*scp -r *' or msg like '*scp -P *')) and ((msg like '*scp /tmp/*' or msg like '*scp /dev/shm/*' or msg like '*scp /var/tmp/*')) ) or ((msg like '*rsync -avz*' or msg like '*rsync -e ssh*' or msg like '*rsync --rsh=ssh*')) or ((msg like '*curl -s | bash*' or msg like '*curl -sL | bash*' or msg like '*wget -q -O- |*' or msg like '*wget -q | bash*')))
